text:
Once upon a time, in a small valley surrounded by towering mountains and deep forests, there lived a cheerful wood rabbit named Pippen.

Pippen loved flowers – all sorts of blooms. On sunny days, she would hop around gathering colorful petals, filling her little hole with them. She had a special spot near the stream, where the water wasn't too muddy.

One spring afternoon, the snowdrops were out in full bloom. They made Pippen think of winter friendships. She thought about the snowman she once made, dancing around in the playful wind. That whimsical idea filled her heart with warmth.

Inspired, Pippen decided to organize a snowy symposium for all the woodland creatures. She planned to celebrate spring with a tea party, inviting animals from every hill, valley, and forest.

The day arrived. Birds were screeching merrily. Owls hooted softly. Rabbits nibbled on carrots. Even fluffy snowflakes danced down.
